articles.title: Mantra’s OM token crashes 90% in 24 hours amid allegations of team dumping
articles.description: The Mantra ecosystems OM token nosedived by as much as 90% over a 24-hour period, slashing billions from its market capitalization, according to CoinGecko data. OMs price crashed from $6. 30 to $0. 3 on April 13, wiping out nearly all of its gains since its rise from $0

articles.title: Saylor signals new Bitcoin buy after Strategy reports nearly $6 billion Q1 unrealized loss
articles.description: Strategy may have resumed its Bitcoin purchases after a one-week break. Michael Saylor, the company's executive chairman, posted the Bitcoin tracker on X on Sunday, a move that typically hints at an upcoming purchase announcement. https://twitter. com/saylor/status/1911408383808217104Saylor's tweet comes after Strategy reported approximately $6 billion in unrealized losses on its Bitcoin holdings during Q1 2025

articles.title: PayPal Expands Crypto Services with Solana and Chainlink for US Users
articles.description: Catenaa, Sunday, April 13, 2025-PayPal has announced the addition of Solana (SOL) and Chainlink (LINK) to its crypto platform for US users, allowing them to buy, sell, hold, and transfer these assets directly. Previously, customers could only access SOL and LINK through third-party services such as MoonPay while using PayPal as a payment method. This […]

articles.title: Ethereum Price Eyes $2,000 Breakout, Stablecoin Activity Hits All-Time High
articles.description: Ethereum (ETH) price is eyeing a breakout above the $2,000 mark. This projection comes as stablecoin activity on the network has jumped to a new all-time high (ATH). More stablecoins are being used on the second-largest blockchain, driven by improvements in scalability and the growing demand for decentralized finance (DeFi) services
